title: husky.yaml
description: Schema for the Husky job scheduler configuration file.

version.description: Husky file format version. Semantic value check is performed after schema validation.

defaults.description: Default values applied to every job unless the job overrides them.

default_run_time.description: Default HHMM time applied to weekly, weekdays, weekends, and on:[...] schedules when a job omits time.

timezone.description: Global IANA timezone identifier. Semantic check performed after schema validation.

jobs.description: Map of job name to job definition.

integrations.description: Provider credentials for notification dispatch. Keys are either known provider names (slack, pagerduty, discord, smtp, webhook) or arbitrary names when provider field is set explicitly.

notifyEvent.description: A notification target — either a shorthand string ("slack:#channel") or a full object.

sla.description: Expected maximum run duration. Fires on_sla_breach notify if exceeded. Semantic check (sla < timeout) performed after schema validation.

tags.description: Arbitrary labels for grouping and bulk CLI operations. Semantic constraints (max 10, max 32 chars, format) are enforced after schema validation.

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier for this job's time field. Semantic check performed after schema validation.

output.description: Variables captured from stdout. Keys are variable names; values are capture mode strings.

integration.description: Credentials for a single notification provider. Semantic validation (required fields per provider) is enforced after schema validation.

provider.description: Explicit provider name. Required when the map key is not itself a known provider name.

webhook_url.description: Incoming webhook URL. Required for slack, discord, and webhook providers.

routing_key.description: PagerDuty Events API v2 routing key. Required for pagerduty provider.

host.description: SMTP server hostname. Required for smtp provider.

port.description: SMTP server port. Defaults to 587 when omitted.

password.description: SMTP authentication password. Should always reference ${env:VAR}.

from.description: Sender address for outbound emails. Required for smtp provider.
